decisions.decision: Use FunASR Docker image as build base
decisions.rationale: Already has required dependencies, available in Chinese registry
curl 7.68.0 lacks WebSocket support; stub allows compilation and basic testing

decisions.decision: Use Chinese Ubuntu mirrors in Dockerfile

next_action: Test module loading in FreeSWITCH: load mod_asr_tts.so via fs_cli
context_notes: Phase 1 core implementation complete. Module compiles successfully (52KB). All compilation errors fixed. GitHub repo created and code pushed. Main remaining work: 1) Test in actual FreeSWITCH environment, 2) Implement real WebSocket with curl 7.86+ or alternative. The stub implementation allows the module to load but won't actually connect to Aliyun ASR.
